content: Aveva piovuto per molti giorni, e la strada era così fangosa che, a volte, Pinocchio sprofondava quasi fino alle ginocchia.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:It had rained for many days, and the road was so muddy that, at times, Pinocchio sank down almost to his knees
